title: DotSlash 9.0
description: A 24-hour hackathon challenging participants to build innovative AI-powered solutions. Over 200 participants across 50 teams competed for prizes worth ₹1,00,000.

title: Echelon
description: A hands-on workshop covering fundamental data structures, algorithms, and strategies for competitive programming contests on Codeforces and LeetCode.

title: CyberSec CTF Challenge
description: A Capture The Flag event testing skills in web exploitation, reverse engineering, cryptography, and forensics. Open to all engineering students.

title: Deep Learning from Scratch
description: A three-day intensive workshop covering neural networks, backpropagation, CNNs, and practical model building using PyTorch from the ground up.

title: Open Source Sprint
description: A weekend-long open source contribution sprint where students contributed to popular GitHub repositories and learned Git workflows, issue triage, and PR review.

title: Tech Talk: Scaling Systems at Google
description: A guest lecture by a Google SRE engineer on distributed systems, load balancing, and the infrastructure behind Google Search.

title: Web Dev Bootcamp
description: A comprehensive full-stack web development bootcamp covering React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and backend APIs with Node.js and Express.

title: Code Clash 3.0
description: The flagship competitive programming contest of ACM SVNIT. Three rounds of increasing difficulty, with participants from 50+ colleges across India.

title: Blockchain & Web3 Workshop
description: An introductory workshop on blockchain technology, smart contracts with Solidity, and building decentralized applications on Ethereum.

title: Orientation: Welcome to ACM
description: The annual orientation event introducing new students to ACM SVNIT, its domains, culture, and opportunities for growth and collaboration.
